name: taskflow-pw
description: Projet de tests end-to-end avec Playwright pour automatiser et valider les parcours de l'application Taskflow.

scripts.test:allure: sh -c 'rm -rf ./allure-results; playwright test "$@"; exit_code=$?; bun run allure:generate; bun run allure:history:update; exit $exit_code' --
scripts.allure:generate: mkdir -p ./allure-history && rm -rf ./allure-report && allure awesome ./allure-results -o ./allure-report --report-name "Taskflow E2E" --history-path ./allure-history/history.jsonl --lang fr
scripts.allure:report: bun run allure:generate && bun run allure:open
